rationale: Environment overrides for integer and boolean settings are parsed to their declared value types with regression coverage.
Invalid bare secret_ref environment values are redacted from effective payloads and reported through diagnostics.
Automated review summary with no separate actionable request beyond the inline findings.
Settings routes now validate scope values inside the router and return the structured settings error contract for malformed scopes.
Duplicate type-consistency feedback covered by typed environment parsing tests.
Broad review summary; its actionable items are covered by the inline comments.
PATCH now preserves no-op handling for empty changes and returns a write-unavailable settings error if validation ever reaches writable settings before persistence exists.
Replaced the Jira-specific hidden input set and conditional with a preset-to-hidden-input map used by isVisiblePresetInput.
Summary review feedback requested the same generic hidden-input mapping, which is now implemented.
